text: ‘A thing detestable’; the Latin translates here as if the wife herself was meant, but the sense of the Hebrew text is more probably that the act mentioned is detestable to the Lord. In any case, it is clear that divorce was permitted to the Hebrews ‘to suit their bard hearts’; cf. Mt. 19.8.
In the Hebrew text, ‘stealing’, in the Latin, ‘seducing’.
